title: Support multiple deterministic dataset roles per score
description:
## Summary
Extend deterministic dataset planning so a score can use more than one fixed dataset role in the optimization process.

## Deliverables
- Define how a score can distinguish a small fixed regression set from a larger fixed benchmark set.
- Resolve whether these roles are separate score-owned dataset pointers, a role-tagged association model, or an equivalent explicit design.
- Ensure the design supports staged optimization workflows without overloading one dataset to serve incompatible purposes.

## Dependency note
This work extends the score-owned reference dataset assignment and should stay aligned with dataset provenance decisions.
